title: transfer — retention windows
description: Two independent retention clocks. Files (heavy) purge fast; DB rows (light) linger longer for history. Tier-based per plan for the DB row — files are uniformly short-lived regardless of plan.

purge.action: auto-transition to cancelled with cancel_reason = 'stalled', emit XferJobCancelled

purge.trigger: retention_expires_at < now() AND purged_at IS NULL
purge.action: delete file from disk, set purged_at, set path = NULL. Ledger row survives until parent XferJob purges.

purge.trigger: retention_expires_at < now() AND purged_at IS NULL
purge.action: delete file, null path, set purged_at + XferJob.artifact_purged_at

purge.trigger: retention_expires_at < now() AND purged_at IS NULL
purge.action: delete file, null path, set purged_at
purge.notes: Errors artifacts get 14d not 7d — users need more time to review + re-import a fixed file.

purge.trigger: retention_expires_at < now() AND purged_at IS NULL
purge.action: delete file, null path, set purged_at
purge.notes: Templates are downloaded then regenerated on demand; 30d cache covers repeat downloads.

purge.trigger: retention_expires_at < now() AND purged_at IS NULL
purge.action: delete file, null path, set purged_at
soft delete (retain for FK integrity with historical XferJob rows referencing mapping_profile_id)
immediate hard delete via FK cascade + file purge orchestrated by PruneXferArtifactsJob(force=true) for the workspace scope
replace causer_id / created_by_id / owner_id with anonymised placeholder + hash of original for chain continuity. Row retained — xfer_jobs are operational evidence.

tier_assignment.description: XferJob.retention_tier column value set at row creation. Precedence: explicit request override (only allowed for platform-admin) > workspace plan default > global config default.

artifact_ttl_config.description: Artifact TTLs are configured in config/transfer.php under `retention.artifact_ttl_days` and overridable per environment.
